content.title: 🎉 Exclusive Offer for Muslims Day Users!
content.subtitle: Get extra 5% discount at Rokomari!
content.body:
🎉 Exclusive Offer for Muslims Day Users! 📚

Assalamu Alaikum!

Great news for book lovers! Muslims Day has partnered with Rokomari to bring you an EXTRA 5% OFF (up to ৳100) on every book! 🛍️

Claim your discount in 3 simple steps:
👉 Visit: https://rkmri.co/lTepoIeeAA2m/
👉 Choose your favorite book
👉 Apply coupon code: MUSLIMSDAY

Whether you're buying Islamic books, self-development books, novels, or anything else, your extra discount applies to all categories.

📖 Read more. Learn more. Grow more.

Happy reading, and may Allah put barakah in your knowledge.

Jazakum Allahu Khayran.
